summary: Dual language subtitle component with layout styling for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/subtitle-dual-lang/src/SubtitleDualLang.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `SubtitleDualLang` and `subtitleDualLangDefaultProps`, then register the `SubtitleDualLang` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Subtitle Dual Lang Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/subtitle-dual-lang to my project. Preserve the exported SubtitleDualLangProps API and register the SubtitleDualLang composition with the default props.
